name: Twilio SMS
description: Twilio SMS provider, contributed into sms:provider — sandboxed. Form-encoded REST over HTTP Basic; the auth token stays host-side.

settings.label: Account SID
settings.help: Twilio Account SID (AC…) — used as the Basic-auth username and in the API path.

secrets.label: Auth Token
secrets.help: Twilio auth token; injected host-side as the Basic-auth password, never seen by the plugin.
